description: A graphic styled as a Bloomberg news article screenshot or card. At the top is the bold black 'Bloomberg' wordmark, beneath which a large black serif headline reads: 'Trump to Add New $100,000 Fee for H-1B Visas in Latest Crackdown.' A byline 'By Josh Wingrove and Hadriana Lowenkron' and a timestamp 'September 19, 2025 1:58pm' follow, along with a row of circular social-share icons (Facebook, X, LinkedIn, email, link). The lower half is a color photograph of President Trump in a dark navy suit with a red tie and American-flag lapel pin, looking forward; behind him is a blurred gilded interior with gold molding and an out-of-focus American flag.
notable_text: Bloomberg - Trump to Add New $100,000 Fee for H-1B Visas in Latest Crackdown.
